feat.name: Rapid Reattunement
feat.text: You spend 10 minutes realigning your elemental connections in an elemental trance. Replace one of your impulse feats using the same process as reflow elements. If you have double reflow, you can replace two impulse feats instead of one.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Exploration
traits.text: An activity with this trait takes more than a turn to use, and can usually be used only during exploration mode.

traits.name: Kineticist
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the kineticist class.
